subcodes.first_line: A Book from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the days of his Lord, the Mighty, the All-Chosen, and hath hearkened unto the Call when it was raised in truth from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا الی الذی فاز بایام ربه العزیز المختار و سمع الندآء اذ ارتفع بالحق من
